basics.description: Generate a read-only operational summary for an existing Azure Virtual Desktop host pool without reopening the broader day-2 operations wizard.

basics.name: deploymentPrefix
basics.label: Deployment Prefix
basics.toolTip: Naming prefix used for deployment metadata and report naming.

elements.name: selectedHostPool
elements.label: Existing host pool
elements.toolTip: Select the host pool that should be assessed for the operational summary.

request.path: [if(and(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool, 'id'), not(empty(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.id)), greater(length(filter(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')), (appGroup) => equals(toLower(string(appGroup.properties.hostPoolArmPath)), toLower(string(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.id))))), 0)), concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', last(take(split(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.id, '/'), 5)), '/providers/Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/applicationGroups/', first(map(filter(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')), (appGroup) => equals(toLower(string(appGroup.properties.hostPoolArmPath)), toLower(string(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.id)))), (appGroup) => appGroup.name)), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments?api-version=2022-04-01'), concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups?api-version=2021-04-01'))]

options.text: [concat('Selected host pool: ', if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool, 'name'), steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.name, 'None'), '. Diagnostics currently attached: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Session hosts discovered: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').sessionHostsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').sessionHostsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]

[concat('Related workspaces discovered: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Related application groups discovered: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]

Optional but recommended: select the FSLogix storage account, the session-host VNet, and optionally the private DNS zone to enrich the summary with storage exposure and private connectivity posture. Leave these blank if you only want the base host-pool operational summary.

[concat('Public network access: ', if(contains(steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixStorageApi, 'properties'), steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixStorageApi.properties.publicNetworkAccess, 'Unknown'), '. Private endpoint connections detected: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixPrivateEndpointConnectionsApi, 'value'), steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixPrivateEndpointConnectionsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]
This action is read-only and emits a structured operational summary for the selected host pool.
The summary returns a target snapshot, posture findings, and recommended follow-up actions in the deployment outputs.
Discovery covers the selected host pool, related application groups and workspaces, and any currently registered session hosts.
Best-practice gaps are returned in the deployment outputs as a structured gap register for later review.
Monitoring findings include control-plane diagnostics posture for the host pool and related AVD resources.
Access findings include assignment posture derived from application groups and resource-group role assignments in scope.
If you provide FSLogix inputs, the summary also reports storage exposure and private-connectivity posture.
Review the deployment outputs for the recommendation set. Typical follow-up actions are Align Monitoring Posture or Configure Scaling Plan.

Assessment coverage: this report now assesses host pool properties, related application groups and workspaces, host pool diagnostic settings, direct workspace and application-group diagnostics coverage, scaling plan attachments, registered session hosts, direct AMA and DCR-association coverage for discovered session hosts, scaling-plan diagnostic coverage, subscription-scope Power On Off Contributor role detection as an autoscale prerequisite proxy, derived application-group role assignments, and FSLogix private-connectivity posture when a storage account is provided. It still does not assess NSG rules, routes, firewalls, guest OS drift, or end-to-end autoscale runtime success.
